schema.description: API response for the REX system.

colors.description: Colors used in the REX system, used for display in the booklet and on the website.

dorms.description: Colors for dorms, used for display in the booklet and on the website
dorms.title: Dorms

groups.description: Colors for groups within dorms, used for display in the booklet and on the website
groups.title: Groups

tags.description: Colors for tags, used for display in the booklet and on the website
tags.title: Tags

colors.title: ColorsAPIResponse

dorms.description: List of dorms in the REX system, used for display in the booklet and on the website
dorms.title: Dorms

end.description: End date of REX, used for display in the booklet and on the website
end.title: End

events.description:
List of events in the REX system, used for display in the booklet and on the website.
Can be uniquely identified by the `Event.id` field.

items.description: Represents an event in the REX system.

description.description: Event description, displayed in the booklet
description.title: Description

dorm.description: Dorms hosting the event. While typically a single dorm, this can also be multiple dorms.
dorm.title: Dorm

id.description: 4-Digit Event Code, used for linking, bookmarking, and making event revisions.
id.title: Id

tags.description: Tags associated with the event, used for filtering and display
tags.title: Tags

items.title: Event

events.title: Events

groups.description: Dictionary mapping dorms to their groups, used for display in the booklet and on the website.
groups.title: Groups

name.description: Name of the REX season, e.g. 'REX 2025'
name.title: Name

published.description: When the API was published, used for display in the booklet and on the website
published.title: Published

start.description: Start date of REX, used for display in the booklet and on the website
start.title: Start

tags.description: List of tags in the REX system, used for display in the booklet and on the website
tags.title: Tags

schema.title: APIResponse
